scripts.test:unit: node tests/url-utils.test.mjs && node tests/url-history.test.mjs && node tests/filename.test.mjs && node tests/ui-state-validation.test.mjs && node tests/capture-profiles.test.mjs && node tests/popup-profile-payload.test.mjs && node tests/capture-queue.test.mjs && node tests/nudges.test.mjs && node tests/nudge-repo.test.mjs && node tests/value-report.test.mjs && node tests/settings.test.mjs && node tests/capabilities.test.mjs && node tests/roadmap-guardrails.test.mjs && node tests/history-utils.test.mjs && node tests/history-thumbs.test.mjs && node tests/protocol-validate.test.mjs && node tests/history-filters.test.mjs && node tests/url-repo.test.mjs && node tests/url-library-change-log-accessibility.test.mjs && node tests/preview-export.test.mjs && node tests/manifest-security.test.mjs && node tests/accessibility-contract.test.mjs && node tests/theme-contract.test.mjs && node tests/gap-remediation-contract.test.mjs
scripts.test:security-policy: node scripts/check-security-policies.mjs && node scripts/check-network-sinks.mjs && node scripts/check-manifest-permissions.mjs && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high
